name: sentinelnet
description: Autonomous verification network where AI agents hire other specialized agents to verify smart contracts

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd contracts && npm install && cd ../agents && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../demo && npm install
scripts.build:all: cd contracts && npm run compile && cd ../agents && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.test:all: cd contracts && npm test && cd ../agents && npm test && cd ../backend && npm test
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules contracts/node_modules agents/node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules demo/node_modules

author: SentinelNet Team
